name: Relic Reclaimer
description:
In a fractured world where mysterious structures known as Vaults appear overnight, each containing ancient Relics of immense power, society is thrown into chaos. Vaults grant incredible abilities to those who brave their traps, puzzles, and monsters, drawing the attention of rival guilds, freelance hunters, and world governments. To maintain order, the Vault Raider Association was established—an international syndicate overseeing relic laws, raid permits, and artifact containment.

But even the Association can’t control everything.

Kael Ardyn, a notorious Vault Seeker, made a name for himself navigating impossible Vaults and surviving where others fell. But fame invites enemies. Betrayed by his own syndicate and left to die during a raid gone wrong, Kael is slain beneath the sealed tomb of the Vault of Echoes.

Only... he doesn’t die.

Instead, Kael awakens 15 years in the past, before the Vaults ever emerged. Before the world broke. Now armed with future knowledge, access to a mysterious System Interface, and a Gacha-driven Relic Selection, Kael sets out to rewrite the timeline—reclaiming relics before they can be abused, exposing traitors before they rise, and building his own legacy as the feared and legendary Relic Reclaimer.

But Kael is not alone. Unseen forces known as Observers are watching, gambling on who will survive the coming collapse. Some offer powers. Others, only ruin.

And in this second life, power has a price.

Make sure to follow and leave a review!
creator: demonsdie
